packages.name: @cubid/core
packages.description: Runtime-agnostic Cubid core client for server-side integrations.

packages.name: @cubid/browser
packages.description: Headless browser helpers for Cubid OTP, hosted verification, and allow flows.

packages.name: @cubid/react
packages.description: React components and hooks for Cubid browser flows.

packages.name: @cubid/evm
packages.description: EVM-oriented Cubid wallet helpers built on top of @cubid/core.

packages.name: @cubid/wagmi
packages.description: wagmi-based React helpers that adapt wallet flows onto @cubid/evm.

packages.name: @cubid/web3
packages.description: Wallet-oriented Cubid helpers built on top of @cubid/core.
